title: Sodium Dynamic Lights
description: Multiloader port of LambDynLights that adds Sodium options integration
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56ae9d34e07794c183a3c9c89b57b6b6043e3b2e.png)

An unofficial Forge/multiloader port of LambDynamicLights that integrates with Sodium and Embeddium.

You may also enjoy [Sodium/Embeddium Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extras)

![sodium options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f224929dc5c2a0cfca922dcbb918ae9d87000db.png)

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14bdbab8f5aae99193fb0be2d36d872da17d96aa.png)
